notes: Operational classes are PROVISIONAL working labels, not a final taxonomy; thresholds heuristic, not yet linked to lift behaviour or predictive usefulness.
slow-contextual velocity_robust set to NaN (residual ~1 deg/hr is integer-quantization noise); resolution_mode=between-day-only.
recommended_resolution_deg = round(near45_sep_median), floored at 1 deg; n/a for between-day-only.
velocity_robust recomputable from dt_bins: sep_median / (dt_median_min/60) in the 45-90 min bin.
